name: claude-stop-no-envelope-absent
description: #47 D3 case (c): a stop payload whose report transcript carries NO starcar-artifact envelope yields a `returned` record with envelope=absent, outcome=error, and the raw report retained in findings (Law 4 - nothing dropped). Provenance: OBSERVED - the landed producer already mints envelope=absent on a fenceless report (scripts/Produce-Artifact.ps1 returned branch + Get-StarcarEnvelope Fault=absent); this vector pins that behaviour so the D4 seam preserves it. No task_id key: there is no envelope to echo one from.

transcript: {"type":"assistant","message":{"role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"I finished but forgot the envelope entirely."}]}}
